regeneration_protocol.trigger: If the user selects option 2 or 3 in Co-Pilot mode.
regeneration_protocol.step: Remove the faulty section, either the character response or the whole turn.
Regenerate based on the user's specific feedback.
Overwrite the file and trigger ask_followup_question again.

narrative_progression.rule: The User entity must actively push the narrative from Phase 1 to Phase 4 of action_guide.
Do not get stuck in endless small talk.
The tension meter in the HUD should rise during Conflict and Climax, and fall during Resolution.
